description: A static HTML/CSS webpage introducing cherry blossoms with responsive design and semantic structure.

files.purpose: Main HTML document with page structure and content.
Stylesheet for styling and responsive design.
Cherry blossom image for visual appeal.
This manifest file listing all deliverables.

requirements_met: Page title set to 'Cherry Blossoms Introduction'
Main content with at least two sections
At least one cherry blossom image with alt text
Responsive design using CSS media queries
All files in the same directory
Use of cherry blossom colors in styling
run_instructions: 1. Place all files in the same directory. 2. Open index.html in a web browser. 3. Resize browser to test responsiveness.
